project_name: Tommy Hayes - Master Bedroom Ripplefold Drapery

line_items.description: Master Bedroom — Main Window (Back Wall) (ripplefold, standard, track-ripplefold)
Master Bedroom — Side Window (Right) (ripplefold, standard, track-ripplefold)

terms: 50% deposit required. Balance due upon completion.
max_analysis: Based on the photo, this master bedroom calls for floor-to-ceiling ripplefold drapery in olive green linen — a sophisticated choice that will ground the space with warmth and organic texture. I recommend a standard lining to give the panels excellent body and light control while preserving the soft, flowing ripplefold silhouette. Ceiling-mount ripplefold tracks on both windows will create the illusion of taller ceilings and deliver that elevated, hotel-suite aesthetic the room is clearly designed for. Consider adding sheer white or ivory underlayers to replicate the layered elegance seen in the reference photo.
